story: Near the end of the mission on Oceanus, Josie talked Captain Brand into letting her take one last short research outing. A sandstorm drove her into a river, where she found a hole in the riverbed and swam down. Beneath it was a vast glowing ecosystem full of strange marine life and fast-regenerating plants; she collected a few samples. That night Duke told her he had discovered the same place earlier and had hidden it because he feared humans would destroy it if Earth learned about it..
implausible_knowledge: Beneath it was a vast glowing ecosystem full of strange marine life and fast-regenerating plants; she collected a few samples. That night Duke told her he had discovered the same place earlier and had hidden it because he feared humans would destroy it if Earth learned about it.
question: What will Captain Brand most plausibly do about the mission?
answer_with_knowledge: Pause the departure, secure the river site, and organize a full investigation of the discovery.
answer_without_knowledge: Continue the normal departure preparations and plan to leave Oceanus on schedule.
